title: Magic of Create
body: This is a highly immersive, VR-ready Neoforge 1.21.1 modpack. The core experience revolves around advanced kinetic engineering through a massive suite of Create addons , balanced with deep magic systems from Ars Nouveau and Occultism. Players can explore a beautifully overhauled world generated by Terralith and Tectonic , all while benefiting from robust performance optimizations like Sodium and Lithium to ensure smooth gameplay in Virtual Reality.
